SELECT "Posts"."Id", "PostTypes"."Type"
    FROM "Posts"
    JOIN "PostTypes" ON "Posts"."PostTypeId" = "PostTypes"."Id"
    WHERE to_tsvector('english', "PostTypes"."Type") @@ to_tsquery('english', 'Question');;1
